series_description: This series contains original documents, paper and electronic media, for the Ohio Bicentennial Commission project. Documents include: OBC Final Report, OBC computer backup disks, Agreements & Contracts, Legal Lease & Partners Information, Advisory Councils project and correspondence files, Legacy & Signature Grants, (6)Regional Offices''''''''program and correspondence files, Calendars, Traveling Exhibit, Smithsonian Folk Life Festival, Bell Castings, Barn Paintings, Corporate Limit Markers, Merchandising, Logo, Trademark and Copy Right Licensing, and Commemorative Bicentennial Quarter/Coin Design submissions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain and transferred to State Archives for their retention or .

series_description: OBC Communication Files. This series contains original documents, paper, electronic and video media for Ohio Bicentennial Commission project.
retention_statement: Paper: Transfer record series to State Archives for their retention, or permanent storage.

series_description: This series contains original documents, paper and electronic media, for the Ohio Bicentennial Commission project. Includes the following documents: OBC Communications files, OBC Meeting Minutes, OBC Financial/Budget files and OBC Members records.
retention_statement: Paper: Transfer to State Archives for their retention, or permanent storage.
